scope: wave2 fan-out migration: only the stations stream is Tier-1 expressible; daily/hourly are a nested-array-of-arrays-plus-dynamic-key-flatten shape the engine's declarative record extraction cannot express (see docs.md Known limits) and remain on the legacy connector.

excluded.reason: records live nested at Data.Providers[].Records[] (an array within an array; the engine's RecordsAt only descends object keys via a dotted path, and cannot flatten across a dynamic number of provider entries), and each record's data-item fields (e.g. DayAirTmpAvg) are a DYNAMIC set of nested {Value,Qc,Unit} objects (driven by the requested dataItems config) each of which legacy flattens into 3 synthetic sibling fields (<Item>_Value/_Qc/_Unit) per key present -- there is no dotted-path wildcard or per-key dynamic-flatten primitive in computed_fields. Genuine ENGINE_GAP, tracked for a follow-up wave; covers both the daily and hourly legacy streams.
